generated.description: This is an autogenerated partial class definition of 'GruneisenParameter'

description*.en: "Gruneisen Parameter" named after Eduard Grüneisen, describes the effect that changing the volume of a crystal lattice has on its vibrational properties, and, as a consequence, the effect that changing temperature has on the size or dynamics of the lattice.

title: GruneisenParameter
description: "Gruneisen Parameter" named after Eduard Grüneisen, describes the effect that changing the volume of a crystal lattice has on its vibrational properties, and, as a consequence, the effect that changing temperature has on the size or dynamics of the lattice.
